title: Tea Time
body:
Adds 21 New Tea Types To The Game:
Chrosu Tea
Floral Tea
Ginger Tea
Glow Berry Tea
Green Tea
Gunpowder-Green Tea
Herbal Tea
Jasmine tea
Kombucha Tea
Lotus Tea
Crimson + warped Fungus Tea
Pitcher Plant Tea
Pumpkin Spice Tea
Sage tea
Spore Blossom Tea
Torch Flower Tea
Vanilla Tea
Wither Rose Tea
Novel-Tea (Joke Item)

Also adds the "Tea Gardens" structure, and a "tea pot" block, for crafting tea
